script.hook: The reason you can't stop analyzing yourself is not self-improvement—it's a trauma loop your brain won't release.
script.body: Every time you replay a conversation or dissect your flaws, you're reinforcing the neural pathway that says you're broken. Your brain treats self-criticism like a threat response, flooding cortisol to 'solve' the problem. But there is no problem to solve—only a cycle that feels productive while it destroys you.
script.cta: Drop a 👁️ if you've been stuck in this without knowing why.

caption_text: The reason you can't stop analyzing yourself is not self-improvement—it's a trau
